context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical team, branch bober/medical-team. Sprint 3 is the end-to-end visible slice: pull WHOOP data and persist it. WhoopSyncAdapter pages WhoopClient across 4 collections (recovery/sleep/cycle/workout), maps records to HealthObservation[] (source='whoop'), writes via the EXISTING ObservationSink in bounded batches with idempotent resume + fail-closed partial-failure safety; plus `bober medical whoop sync [--since <iso>]` CLI mirroring `medical import`.

completedSprints.title: WHOOP egress axis + transport
completedSprints.summary: Commit e442cc9. src/medical/whoop/whoop-client.ts exports WhoopClient { ensureAccessToken(); fetchPage(collection, window, cursor?): Promise<WhoopPage> } with WhoopCollection/SyncWindow/WhoopPage/WhoopRecord types, injectable FetchLike/waiter/nowIso, assertAllowed-first. src/medical/whoop/whoop-token.ts exports WhoopTokenStore { clientCredentials() (throws if env unset); readRefreshToken(): Promise<string|undefined>; writeTokens() 0600 }. EgressGuard has third 'device-connection' axis (default false); EgressGuard.fromConfig reads it. whoop-client.ts is the ONLY new ESLint-excepted network file — whoop-sync.ts and the CLI must NOT import network.

completedSprints.title: Refusal layer
completedSprints.summary: Commit 2a8ff70. Refusal guardrail (unrelated to this sprint's surface).

completedSprints.title: Base medical team
completedSprints.summary: Reuse UNCHANGED: src/medical/ingestion.ts (IngestionNormalizer, ObservationSink, StoreObservationSink, bounded-batch backpressure); src/medical/health-store.ts (HealthDataStore content-derived SHA-256 id + upsertObservations INSERT OR IGNORE returning new-row count); src/medical/adapters/apple-health.ts (bounded ~1000-row batch + writeBatch backpressure precedent); src/cli/commands/medical.ts ('medical import' command: action + print + store.close() in finally + process.exitCode on error + never throw — the CLI template); src/medical/types.ts (IngestionResult {recordsParsed,newRows}, HealthObservation, AuditEvent 'ingest'). Do NOT modify IngestionAdapter, ObservationSink, or the health_observations schema.
